publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-12-09 00:07:47 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Accounts, correspondence, financial and legal records, speeches, genealogical information, farm records, and other papers.
did.abstract: Accounts, correspondence, and financial and legal records relating to Hitchings's various positions as an officer and employee of the Co-operative Grange League Federation Exchange (ca. 1920-1928) and as a consultant and officer in various agricultural agencies; also, other personal and family papers.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Accounts, correspondence, and financial and legal records relating to Hitchings's various positions as an officer and employee of the Co-operative Grange League Federation Exchange (ca. 1920-1928) and as a consultant and officer in various agricultural agencies; also, records (1930-1935) relating to Hitchings's tenure as a member and as president of the Board of Education of Onondaga Centralized School District #1, his correspondence with the Americanization League of Syracuse and Onondaga County (ca. 1923-1927), and speeches he gave before farm groups. Hitchings family papers include an autobiographical sketch; an unpublished manuscript by his brother, Harold Ramsdell Hitchings; a diary (1884) of his father, Grant G. Hitchings; genealogical information; and other items relating to the family farm at South Onondaga, New York, including general farm and orchard accounts (41 vols., 1808-1926), labor reports (2 vols., 1910-1911), and records of a sod mulch and cultivated orchard experiment (3 vols., 1904-1914).

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Raymond Clark Hitchings papers, #2580. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Farmers.
Orchards -- New York (State)
Mulching.
Farms.
Agriculture -- New York (State)
controlaccess.corpname: Americanization League of Syracuse and Onondaga County

did.unittitle: Ms. History of the Establishment of the Co-operative Grange League Federation Exchange
Minutes of the Meetings of the Board of Directors of the C.G.L.F.E. (incomplete carbons)
Minutes of the Executive Committee of the C.G.L.F.E., Inc. (incomplete carbons)
Minutes of the Department Head and Program Department Head Conferences (carbons)
Correspondence re: the C.F.L.F.E. including memo re: Hitchings' dual responsibilities as warehouse manager and secretary-treasurer
Miscellaneous correspondence re: the C.G.L.F.E. including proposed corporation insurance on the life of Mr. H.E. Babcock
Miscellaneous correspondence re: the C.G.L.F.E. including H.E. Babcock's letter of resignation
Fiscal papers, largely balance sheets and statements re: the C.G.L.F.E. and Producers' Warehouse & Elevator Company
Miscellaneous inventories and statistical data re: the C.G.L.F.E.
Miscellaneous C.G.L.F.E. and Producers' Warehouse and Elevator Company periodicals, including incomplete runs of the Warehouse Managers Weekly Newsletter and the G.L.F. Stockholder
Miscellaneous circulars re: the C.G.L.F.E. including "Some Facts about the C.G.L.F.E."
Correspondence and related items re: the Surplus Marketing Administration, U.S. Dept. of Agriculture
"Records of Procurement Seeds from America (U.S. & Canada) through the British Food Mission for the Ministry of Agriculture" (oversize)
Correspondence and related papers re: seed shipments, Surplus Marketing Administration, U.S. Department of Agriculture
Marshall Plan Commodities shipped to Europe in 1947 (looseleaf notebook)
Notebook containing charge-out cards and code list (1948) of Economic Cooperation Administration (notebook)
Statistics on Roumanian corn, Surplus Marketing Administration, U.S. Department of Agriculture
Correspondence and related items re: rice exports, Office of Price Stabilization
Mimeographed material re: the International Cooperation Administration
Miscellaneous papers re: the International Farm Youth Exchange
Correspondence, notes, and mimeograph circulars re: the 1959 National Farm Union's Farm Training Program at Denver (looseleaf ring binder)
Miscellaneous grain records (oversize record book without cover)
Series II. Personal, civic, and social papers
R.C. Hitchings, "My Duties for the Past 35 Years" (typescript)
South Onondaga Central School District and Centralized School District #1
Miscellaneous papers re: the Suth Onondaga Central School District and the Centralized School District #1, including minutes, legal and fiscal records
Americanization League of Syracuse and Onondaga County
Reports and correspondence re: the American League of Syracuse and Onondaga County
1. Who is Fenced In, the Dairyman or the Herd?"
Genealogical records re: the Hitchings Family
Debate minutes: "Resolved, that the East offers better inducement to young men than the West"
Harold R. Hitchings: "Sod Mulch Orchard Management" (ms. book)
Diary of Grant G. Hitchings (leather covered diary)
Legal papers re: right of way on the Hitchings Farm
Series IV. Hitchings family farm records
Hitchings Account Book, John Hitchings property
Farm Accounts, Labor Records and notes (day book)
Inventory, statement, and farm accounts (day book)
Grant G. Hitchings' inventory, statements, accounts (miscellaneous record book)
Farm accounts, inventory, and statements (day book)
"Account of operation and sales of fruit orchard owned by W.T. White which consist of 14 A sold to him in 1909 by G.G. Hitchings"
United States Department of Agriculture in Farm Management Investigations ..., Regular Worker's Daily Time Sheet
United States Department of Agriculture, Proprietors or Superintendents Daily Labor Report (bound book)
Sod mulch and cultivated orchards experiment
Records, Sod mulch and cultivated orchards experiment with Geneva Agricultural Station, Plot A (record book)
Records, Sod mulch and cultivated orchards experiment with Geneva Agricultural Station, Plot B (record book)
Records, Sod mulch and cultivated orchards experiment with Geneva Agricultural Station, Plot C (record book)
Farm records - Record for United States Department of Agriculture re: daily operations and cost for apple orchards, oats and barley, corn, berries, wheat (work record)
"Orchards as planted from 1885 to 1930 on page 20" (journal)
Farm records, primarily re: daily operation and labor costs (record book)
Miscellaneous clippings, apple basket labels, etc.
